metadata.title: After the Cloud — ByteForge
metadata.description: Who we are and why we do it. Give your website the excellence it deserves: reliable, secure, and high-performance hosting.

hero.title: Who we are and why we do it
hero.subtitle: Give your website the excellence it deserves: reliable, secure, and high-performance hosting that fuels your digital growth.

aboutPage.sectionTitle: Infrastructure designed for modern digital businesses

intro.first: We help companies, developers and online projects build reliable digital experiences through scalable, secure and high-performance hosting solutions.
intro.second: Our focus is not only infrastructure, but long-term stability, technical excellence and real support for every stage of growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To revolutionize the digital landscape by offering robust hosting solutions that allow companies and projects to grow with innovation, security, and stability.

role.title: Our Role
role.desc: To be the technological backbone of businesses worldwide, providing state-of-the-art infrastructure, maximum reliability, and constant support so that every customer can thrive in the digital environment.

value.title: Our Value
value.desc: We focus on delivering real value: optimized performance, advanced security, and personalized support. Our commitment is clear: to drive the success of every client in their digital projects.

cta.heading: Start your digital success story with us
Start your digital success story here
cta.description: Launch your next project with secure infrastructure, high-performance servers and scalable hosting solutions.

globalTrust.title: Secure digital presence
globalTrust.description: With our high-performance infrastructure, we guarantee a reliable environment for your website to operate without interruption, protected with the most advanced security technology and supported by a team available whenever you need it.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our hosting infrastructure, deployment process and support services.

items.q: What type of hosting do you offer?
items.a: We offer shared hosting, VPS, dedicated servers and cloud hosting solutions tailored to different kinds of projects.
Yes, our support team is available 24/7 to help you whenever you need assistance.

items.q: Do your plans include a free SSL certificate?
items.a: Yes, all our plans include free SSL certificates to improve your website security.

items.q: Can I scale my plan later?
items.a: Absolutely, you can easily upgrade your plan as your project grows and requires more resources.
Yes, we perform automatic backups to protect your information and simplify data recovery.

items.q: How fast is the deployment process?
items.a: Our system allows instant deployments so you can launch your project within minutes.
